commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b0d25865d8fae205da6fde33ff1156f950607f1d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram command-menu sync to call `getMyCommands()` for each configured base command scope before skipping registration when the local command hash matches.

PR surface: Source +23. Total +23 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: populate the cached hash, keep default and group command scopes non-empty, clear one `language_code` command variant, and the PR returns after base-scope `getMyCommands()` checks without re-registering the localized menu. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor or maintainer action because the PR has a concrete correctness gap and insufficient current-head real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not repair-marker this while proof remains a contributor-side merge gate.
